title: The Promise School (Okehampton): warning notice
body: "Notice relating to: The Promise School  URN: 149041  Notice issued to: Dartmoor Multi Academy Trust  Reason for issue: Special measures Ofsted judgement  DfE regional director: Lucy Livings  DfE regional director office: South West  Local authority: Devon County Council  "
